# AgentPlane

site: https://agentplane.org
docs: https://agentplane.org/docs
blog: https://agentplane.org/blog
repo: https://github.com/basilisk-labs/agentplane

summary: Open-source audit layer for coding agents; gives Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Aider, and other coding-agent tools a repository-native task, policy, verification, branch, closure, and Agent Change Record lifecycle.
not: hosted agent runtime, model provider, IDE, CI replacement, pull-request replacement.
capabilities: task planning, policy routing, approval-gated execution, verification evidence, branch_pr worktrees, pull-request handoff, release/publish automation, recipe modules.
acr-schema: https://agentplane.org/schemas/acr-v0.1.schema.json

index:
- https://agentplane.org/docs/manifesto
- https://agentplane.org/docs/compare
- https://agentplane.org/docs/user/overview
- https://agentplane.org/docs/user/setup
- https://agentplane.org/docs/user/workflow
- https://agentplane.org/docs/user/commands
- https://agentplane.org/docs/user/agent-change-record
- https://agentplane.org/docs/workflow-guides/claude-code
- https://agentplane.org/docs/workflow-guides/codex
- https://agentplane.org/docs/workflow-guides/cursor
- https://agentplane.org/docs/workflow-guides/aider
- https://agentplane.org/docs/recipes/code-map
- https://agentplane.org/docs/developer/architecture
- https://agentplane.org/docs/developer/cli-contract
